description: Visual payload router for QR capture and automation
post_install: if (Test-Path $persistRules) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $appRulesDir -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item $persistRules $appRules -Force } elseif (Test-Path $appRules) { Copy-Item $appRules $persistRules -Force } elseif (Test-Path $defaultRules) { Copy-Item $defaultRules $persistRules -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $appRulesDir -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item $defaultRules $appRules -Force }
foreach ($n in $legacy) { Remove-Item (Join-Path $desktop "$n.lnk") -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item (Join-Path $startMenu "$n.lnk") -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
Write-Host 'VisioFlow bootstrap complete (rules + Start Menu shortcuts via Scoop).'

script: $names = @('VisioFlow QR Camera (auto)', 'VisioFlow QR Camera (copy)', 'VisioFlow QR Snip (auto)', 'VisioFlow QR Snip (copy)', 'VisioFlow Scan (Auto)', 'VisioFlow Scan (Copy)', 'VisioFlow Scan (Plain)')
foreach ($n in $names) { Remove-Item (Join-Path $desktop "$n.lnk") -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item (Join-Path $startMenu "$n.lnk") -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
Write-Host 'Removed VisioFlow legacy shortcuts and launchers. Rules kept in scoop persist (scoop uninstall -p to purge). visioflow: protocol registry left in HKCU (refreshed on next notify test).'
